title: Shoot Again: The Resurgence of Pinball
original_title: Shoot Again: The Resurgence of Pinball
overview: In an era of digital, streaming, cloud-based, and electronic entertainment, pinball is a paradox. With most forms of modern entertainment downloadable to the palm of your hand, how does a 300-pound box of wires and lights survive, and continue to thrive?
